title: Create portfolio with core attributes
user_story: As a Platform Admin, I want to create a portfolio capturing name, description, manager, and associated companies so that shared-services teams can administer multiple companies together.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am authenticated as Platform Admin on Company Management > Portfolios; when I click "+ Create Portfolio" and enter Portfolio Name, Description, select a Portfolio Manager, and multi-select associated companies from active companies; then the system creates the portfolio, auto-generates a PortfolioCode in format PORT-YYYY-NNN, sets Status to Active, and persists CreatedDate, CreatedBy; and only Platform Admin can access the create action (Create Portfolio is denied to Portfolio Admin, Group Company Admin, and Company Admin per RBAC).
source: PORT-FR-001 (§3.2.1), §7.1 RBAC Create Portfolio, §4.2.2 Portfolio Entity

title: Validate portfolio name and description fields
user_story: As a Platform Admin, I want portfolio name and description validated so that portfolio records stay consistent and unique.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am creating or editing a portfolio; when I submit a Portfolio Name; then the system enforces Portfolio Name is required, unique across portfolios, and 3-50 characters, and rejects a duplicate name with error PORT_001 (Portfolio name exists, HTTP 409); and when I enter a Description, then it is optional and limited to 500 characters maximum.

title: Enforce one-portfolio-per-company constraint
user_story: As a Platform Admin, I want the system to prevent a company from belonging to more than one portfolio so that portfolio ownership stays unambiguous.
acceptance_criteria: Given a company is already associated with an existing portfolio; when I attempt to add that same company to another portfolio during creation or modification; then the system rejects the association with error PORT_002 (Company already in another portfolio, HTTP 409) and the company is not added; and the company selector only offers active companies not already in another portfolio.

title: Enforce portfolio manager role requirement
user_story: As a Platform Admin, I want the assigned portfolio manager to hold the Portfolio Manager role so that only authorized users manage a portfolio.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am assigning a Portfolio Manager to a portfolio; when I select a user who does not hold the Portfolio Manager role; then the system rejects the assignment and requires a user with the Portfolio Manager role; and when I select a valid user with the Portfolio Manager role, then the PortfolioManagerId is saved as a foreign key to that user.

title: Enforce minimum one company per portfolio
user_story: As a Platform Admin, I want a portfolio to contain at least one company after creation so that portfolios are never left empty in operation.
acceptance_criteria: Given a portfolio exists; when I attempt to remove companies such that zero companies would remain; then the system blocks the operation and enforces a minimum of one company per portfolio; and the empty state is permitted only transiently during initial creation before companies are selected.

title: Add companies to an existing portfolio
user_story: As a Platform Admin, I want to add companies to an existing portfolio so that the shared-services team can expand its scope.
acceptance_criteria: Given I open Manage Companies for a portfolio; when I add one or more active companies that do not belong to another portfolio; then each company is linked via a PortfolioCompany junction record capturing PortfolioId, CompanyId, AddedDate, and AddedBy; and any company already in another portfolio is rejected with error PORT_002.

title: Remove companies from a portfolio with confirmation
user_story: As a Portfolio Admin, I want to remove a company from my portfolio with a confirmation step so that I do not accidentally detach a company.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am the Portfolio Admin (Portfolio Manager) of my own portfolio; when I remove a company; then the system displays a confirmation dialog before removing, and upon confirmation deletes the PortfolioCompany junction record; and the removal is blocked if it would leave the portfolio with fewer than one company; and Add/Remove Companies is permitted for Platform Admin and the Portfolio Admin of the own portfolio only.

title: Change portfolio manager
user_story: As a Platform Admin, I want to change the manager assigned to a portfolio so that management responsibility can be reassigned.
acceptance_criteria: Given a portfolio exists with an assigned manager; when I change the Portfolio Manager to another user; then the system validates the new user holds the Portfolio Manager role, updates PortfolioManagerId, and records ModifiedDate and ModifiedBy; and the change is captured in the audit trail as a PORTFOLIO_MODIFIED event.

title: Update portfolio description
user_story: As a Portfolio Admin, I want to update my portfolio's description so that its purpose stays accurate.
acceptance_criteria: Given I manage a portfolio; when I edit and save the Description; then the system validates the 500-character maximum, persists the new value, updates ModifiedDate and ModifiedBy, and logs a PORTFOLIO_MODIFIED audit event with the changes and user.

title: View portfolios list
user_story: As a Platform Admin, I want to view the list of portfolios with manager and company summary so that I can oversee shared-services structures.
acceptance_criteria: Given I open Company Management > Portfolios; then each portfolio card shows Portfolio name, Manager (name and email), and Companies count with company names, plus actions View Details, Edit, and Manage Companies; and the [+ Create Portfolio] action is visible only to Platform Admin.

title: Create portfolio via API
user_story: As a Platform Admin integrator, I want to create a portfolio via the API so that portfolios can be provisioned programmatically.
acceptance_criteria: Given a valid bearer token with Platform Admin authority; when I POST /api/v1/portfolios with portfolioName, description, portfolioManagerId, and companyIds; then the API returns 201 Created with portfolioId, portfolioCode (PORT-YYYY-NNN), portfolioName, status Active, the linked companies with addedDate, and createdDate; and it returns 409 with PORT_001 for a duplicate portfolio name and 409 with PORT_002 if any company is already in another portfolio.

title: Company context switcher dropdown
user_story: As a multi-company user, I want a company context selector in the header so that I can switch the company I am working in.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am a user with access to multiple companies; when I view the header, then a company context selector displays the current company prominently with its name; and when I open the dropdown, then it lists only my authorized companies with the current one marked selected, plus a "View All Companies..." option; and the selector is hidden for single-company users.

title: Validate authorization on context switch
user_story: As a user, I want the system to validate my authorization before switching company context so that I cannot access unauthorized companies.
acceptance_criteria: Given I select a target company from the switcher; when the system processes the switch; then it validates my authorization for the target company, and if I am not authorized it denies the switch with error AUTH_002 (Context switch not permitted, HTTP 403) and keeps my current context; and Switch to Authorized Companies is permitted for Platform Admin, Portfolio Admin, and Group Company Admin, while Switch to Any Company is limited to Platform Admin.

title: Load target company configuration and security on switch
user_story: As a user, I want the target company's configuration and security policies applied when I switch context so that I operate under the correct company settings.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am authorized for the target company; when the context switch succeeds; then the system loads company-specific configuration (currency, time zone, date format), applies the company-specific security policies, and refreshes the navigation menu based on that company's permissions; and a new JWT is issued carrying the target company claim so subsequent API requests validate against the new context.
source: PORT-FR-005 (§3.2.2), §6.2.2 Switch Company Context API, §7.2 Session Binding

title: Maintain session state across context switch
user_story: As a user, I want my in-progress HR actions preserved when I switch company context so that I do not lose unsaved work.
acceptance_criteria: Given I have in-progress session state (shopping-cart equivalent for HR actions); when I switch company context and later return; then the system maintains the session state rather than discarding it, and my in-progress actions remain available.

title: Switch company context via API
user_story: As an integrator, I want a switch-company API so that context can be changed programmatically.
acceptance_criteria: Given a valid session; when I POST /api/v1/users/switch-company with targetCompanyId; then on success the API returns 200 with success true, previousCompany, currentCompany, a new sessionToken with updated claims, the permissions array, and the target company configuration (currency, timeZone, dateFormat); and it returns 403 AUTH_002 when the user is not authorized for the target company.
source: §6.2.2 Switch Company Context API, PORT-FR-005, AUTH_002 (§9)

title: Bookmarkable company-context URLs
user_story: As a user, I want bookmarkable URLs that carry the company context so that I can return directly to a specific company.
acceptance_criteria: Given a company-specific URL that includes the company identifier as a URL parameter or path segment; when I access that URL, then the system automatically switches my context to that company if I am authorized; and if I am not authorized, then it redirects me to the company selector rather than exposing the company.

title: Display company context indicator
user_story: As a user, I want a clear company context indicator so that I always know which company I am operating in.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am working within a company context; then the header displays the current company name and, if configured, the company logo, with optional colour coding for visual distinction; and the indicator updates immediately after a successful context switch.

title: Portfolio-level reporting with company filter and consolidated metrics
user_story: As a Portfolio Admin, I want portfolio-level reports with a company filter and consolidated metrics so that I can analyze performance across my portfolio.
acceptance_criteria: Given I open portfolio reporting; when I multi-select companies within the portfolio and run a report; then the system produces consolidated metrics across the selected companies; and the results respect row-level security so I see data only for companies I am authorized for.

title: Export portfolio reports
user_story: As a Portfolio Admin, I want to export portfolio reports so that I can share consolidated data outside the system.
acceptance_criteria: Given a portfolio report is displayed; when I choose Export; then the system exports the report to Excel or PDF format, and the exported data includes only companies permitted by row-level security.

title: Per-company bulk employee import
user_story: As a Portfolio Admin, I want to run bulk employee imports per company within my portfolio so that I can onboard employees efficiently.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am the Portfolio Admin for the portfolio; when I initiate a bulk employee import targeted at a specific company in the portfolio; then the system processes the import scoped to that company only, and records the operation in the portfolio audit trail with the company affected and success/failure status.

title: Cross-company employee search and view
user_story: As a Portfolio Admin, I want to search and view employees across companies in my portfolio so that I can locate people quickly.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am the Portfolio Admin; when I perform a cross-company employee search; then results span the companies in my portfolio subject to row-level security, and I can view employee details for authorized companies only; and any cross-company access is logged in the audit trail.

title: Standardized policy deployment across companies
user_story: As a Portfolio Admin, I want to deploy a standardized policy to multiple companies in my portfolio so that policies stay consistent.
acceptance_criteria: Given I have a standardized policy to distribute; when I push it to multiple selected companies in the portfolio; then the system applies the policy to each targeted company and records the deployment in the portfolio audit trail capturing the companies affected, action type and parameters, timestamp, and per-company success/failure status.

title: Portfolio-wide announcements
user_story: As a Portfolio Admin, I want to broadcast announcements portfolio-wide so that all companies in the portfolio receive consistent communication.
acceptance_criteria: Given I compose a portfolio-wide announcement; when I publish it; then the system distributes the announcement to all companies in the portfolio, and records the operation in the audit trail with the user, companies affected, timestamp, and success/failure status.

title: Audit trail for portfolio-level operations
user_story: As a Platform Admin, I want every portfolio-level operation captured in an audit trail so that cross-company actions are traceable and compliant.
acceptance_criteria: Given any portfolio-level operation is performed; when it completes; then the audit trail records the user who performed the action, the companies affected, the action type and parameters, the timestamp, and the success/failure status; and PORTFOLIO_CREATED, PORTFOLIO_MODIFIED, and CONTEXT_SWITCHED events are captured with their specified data (portfolio config and companies; changes and user; from-company and to-company respectively); and audit logs are retained for 7 years.

title: Record CONTEXT_SWITCHED audit event
user_story: As a Platform Admin, I want each company context switch logged so that cross-company access is fully auditable.
acceptance_criteria: Given a user completes a company context switch; when the switch succeeds; then a CONTEXT_SWITCHED audit event is written capturing the from-company and to-company and user; and a failed switch attempt (AUTH_002) is also logged per the tenant isolation rule that all cross-company access attempts are logged whether successful or failed.

title: Portfolio status lifecycle
user_story: As a Platform Admin, I want a portfolio to carry a status so that inactive portfolios can be distinguished from active ones.
acceptance_criteria: Given a portfolio record; then its Status is an enum limited to Active or Inactive, defaulting to Active on creation; and the status is displayed on the portfolio and changes are recorded via ModifiedDate, ModifiedBy and a PORTFOLIO_MODIFIED audit event.
